ip_outcome_note: Card name contains 'Son Goku' explicitly. The card's own text identifies Character as 'Son Goku: Childhood' and Special Traits as 'Saiyan/World Tournament'. Orange-and-blue gi with black spiky hair are Goku's canonical visual identifiers for his childhood/original-Dragon-Ball era. Verified via card oracle text on official product pages.

trivia_bullets.text: Future Martial Artist Son Goku (TB2-052) is a yellow-color Common Battle card with 12,000 power and Super Combo status. It can only be included up to 4 times in a deck (Super Combo rule). Its auto-ability triggers when comboing: if the Leader is 'World Tournament' and life is 5 or less, draw 1 card and gain +10,000 combo power for the turn — a low-life recovery mechanic that rewards playing into the Tenkaichi Budokai theme.
sources: WebSearch: DBZ Exchange TB2-052 product page
WebSearch: House Rules Gaming TB2-052 listing

trivia_bullets.text: The card's era tag is 'World Martial Arts Tournament Saga' and character type is 'Son Goku: Childhood' — placing this depiction in the original Dragon Ball continuity, specifically around the 22nd or 23rd Tenkaichi Budokai when Goku was still a young fighter before the Saiyan Saga. The 'Future Martial Artist' title implies potential rather than power already realized.
sources: WebSearch: DBZ Exchange TB2-052 product page
WebSearch: CBR '37 Years Ago Today, the Best Anime Tournament of All Time Began'

trivia_bullets.text: As a Super Combo card, TB2-052 is a deck-construction resource rather than a primary attacker — its 12,000 power is modest, but it provides card draw when the controller is on the back foot (life at 5 or less). This mirrors the character's lore position: young Goku as potential not yet fulfilled, someone who loses to Piccolo at the 23rd tournament and wins only on a ring-out technicality.
sources: WebSearch: CBR Dragon Ball 23rd Budokai tournament article

related_cards.name: Feet Kamehameha
related_cards.note: TB2-049 Extra card explicitly boosts green Son Goku leaders — direct mechanical partner.

related_cards.name: Toughened Up Krillin
related_cards.note: Krillin fought Goku in the 22nd Tenkaichi Budokai semi-finals; same set, shared World Tournament trait.

related_cards.name: Master Roshi, Martial Meister
related_cards.note: Goku's teacher and the Jackie Chun alias opponent at the 21st tournament.
